message:
chore: add tmp_target_*/ pattern to gitignore

Agents use tmp_target_mesh/ and similar directories for isolated
builds. These are ephemeral build artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,6 +109,7 @@ test_ip.rs
 # Local/alternate build target directories (agent experiments)
 local_target/
 tmp_target/
+tmp_target_*/
 
 # Build/test artifacts directory
 artifacts/
